snapshot.title: Wire unified mission flow

acceptanceCriteria.text: Single /games/today route steps through all 3 games with narrative wrapping
Completing game 3 triggers chapter increment via /api/story/progress POST
Users who revisit after completion see a summary/resolution view, not the games again
Home page CTA reflects today's storyline and user's chapter number
